title: Turne off arrow
description: Removes arrows fired by non-players when colliding with a block or entity.
body:
_Hello, everyone. First of all, I strongly recommend that you download projects through the official curseforge and modrinth launchers—this will increase the reward for the creators. Thank you all very much for your support!!!_

[![chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7ba56bdea313f30d12390daaabdd4d5e3893385.webp)](https://discord.gg/s8vZR4PGr2)  [![chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52c207f69601eccbc73c2502cf7e0c666d3bb793.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/turne-off-arrow)

**This modification removes arrows fired by any creature or launcher after they hit their target (i.e., hit a block or creature).**

**"Tired of the pile of arrows fired by skeletons or bandits that you can't pick up? Here's your solution!"**

[![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be430e7f950991c85de23828c5efe38f082a33c8.webp)](https://ko-fi.com/iyouroverlord!) [![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b47082063c60d519ee5fd5b194cc1b85bc1a976d.png)](https://www.patreon.com/c/IYourOverlord)[![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a51142c3cb736fe0310203307c1221610885d03c.png)](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=E7U2TQU7QAVJN)

### Command
The modification also provides a command to enable and disable the main function:

/gamerule arrowCleanerRemoveMobArrows
### Configuration
When the mod is activated, a configuration file is automatically created that allows you to enable and disable the arrow removal function, as well as flexibly configure the removal time after hitting a block or object.
![chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc77236a76a7f649181d4e6ae365f8e918c1d1c0.png)
